note: NightG BBasePlusSideDelta: keep a NightB-like tucked roll base for all commands, then add gated lateral outward delta on top; split low-speed roll targets by side. Command: Night G：统一使用 NightB 风格轻微内收基础 roll；侧移时不替换基础姿态，只在同一基础上叠加 signed outward delta 和外侧脚 extra；低速 roll 改成左右分别追小内收目标，避免 roll 同值约束打架。
